title: Oil Extends Losses As Supply Risks Fade
section_path: Oil Extends Losses As Supply Risks Fade
section_path_text: Oil Extends Losses As Supply Risks Fade
summary:
Main
Shifts in the macro-economic backdrop left the market in two minds for most of the week. However, elevated supply risks continued to provide a strong level of support for energy and metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Gold ended the week lower amid the fallout from last week's FOMC meeting.
